title: Immutable Reference
instruction: Create a String `s = String::from("hello")`. Create an immutable reference `r = &s` and print using r.

title: Option
instruction: Declare `let maybe: Option<i32> = None`. If it is Some(n), print n; otherwise print "none".
hint: match maybe { Some(n) => println!("{}", n), None => println!("none") }

title: Mutable Reference
instruction: Create `let mut x = 10`. Take a mutable reference `let r = &mut x`, add 1 through r (*r += 1), then print x.
hint: The code is already complete — run it.
